headerDisplay:
Homebridge plugin for PETLIBRO smart pet devices.

**Important:** PETLIBRO only allows one session per account. If you keep the PETLIBRO mobile app signed in alongside Homebridge, the plugin will be silently logged out (and vice versa). The recommended setup is to **create a dedicated PETLIBRO account just for Homebridge** and share your devices to it from your primary account.

Review [Account Management](https://github.com/jjjonesjr33/petlibro/wiki/PetLibro-Account-Management) and [Password Limitations](https://github.com/jjjonesjr33/petlibro/wiki/PetLibro-Password-Limitation) for caveats.

email.title: PETLIBRO Account Email
email.description: Email address used to log in to PETLIBRO. Strongly recommended to be a dedicated account, not your primary one.

password.title: PETLIBRO Account Password
password.description: Stored in plaintext in your Homebridge config. The plugin MD5-hashes it before sending to the API, but the original is needed to log in. Use a unique password for this account.

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: Fast-tier polling cadence for live state. Slow-tier endpoints refresh every 5 minutes regardless. After any user action, polling temporarily speeds up to 15s for 2 minutes.

manualFeedPortions.title: Manual Feed Portions
manualFeedPortions.description: Number of portions to dispense when the Manual Feed switch is triggered. 1 portion ≈ 1/12 cup on standard feeders.

desiccantCycleDays.title: Desiccant Cycle (days)
desiccantCycleDays.description: How many days a fresh desiccant pack lasts. Drives the Filter Life % shown in the Eve app.

ui.title: HomeKit Service Visibility
ui.description: Choose which services appear in Home.app. Disabling a service removes it from the accessory entirely (and any automations using it will stop working).

useEmojiNames.title: Use emoji in default service names
useEmojiNames.description: Prepends an emoji to each service name (🍽️ Feed Now, 💡 Indicator, 🔒 Child Lock, etc.) for easier scanning in Home.app. Services you've already renamed are unaffected.

exposeIndicator.title: Show Indicator Light
exposeIndicator.description: Renders as a Lightbulb in Home.app (was a Switch in 0.4.x and earlier).

exposeChildLock.title: Show Child Lock
exposeChildLock.description: Renders as a Lock in Home.app (was a Switch in 0.4.x and earlier). Supports Siri lock/unlock verbs.

exposeResetDesiccant.title: Show Reset Desiccant switch
exposeResetDesiccant.description: Off by default. Most users reset the desiccant counter manually on the device once a month — no need for a dedicated tile.

exposeRecentFeed.title: Show Recent Feed sensor
exposeRecentFeed.description: Contact sensor that briefly opens after each successful feed; useful as an automation trigger.

debug.title: Debug Logging
debug.description: Enable verbose debug logs. Useful when reporting issues.
